name: Brentwood Central Park
description: The heart of Brentwood's outdoor recreation. Featuring walking trails, playgrounds, sports courts, and beautiful green spaces perfect for picnics and community gatherings.

name: The Harvest Kitchen
description: Farm-to-table restaurant celebrating local ingredients and seasonal menus. Cozy atmosphere with outdoor seating. Known for artisanal cuisine and exceptional service.

name: Brentwood Public Library
description: Modern library featuring curated collections, study spaces, tech labs, and community meeting rooms. Host to regular author events, book clubs, and educational workshops.

name: Riverside Wellness Center
description: Complete fitness and wellness facility with gym, yoga studios, swimming pool, and nutrition counseling. Classes for all fitness levels and ages.

name: Brentwood Art Museum
description: Showcasing contemporary and traditional art from local, regional, and international artists. Interactive exhibits, artist studios, and art education programs.

name: Café Conversations
description: Independent coffee roastery and café. Community hub featuring live music, open mics, and board games. Locally sourced pastries and specialty drinks.

name: Brentwood Zoo
description: Educational zoo featuring wildlife from around the world. Interactive exhibits, animal talks, and conservation programs. Great for families.

name: The Commons Market
description: Upscale grocery store, gourmet food hall, and restaurant. Premium selection of local and international products. Dining options for quick lunch or casual dinner.

name: Brentwood Community Theater
description: Performing arts venue hosting local theater productions, musicals, and comedy shows. Beautiful historic building with excellent acoustics.
